subtitle: Answers to common questions about GovArc Support accounts, security, and access.

whatIsGovArc.a: GovArc Support is the public help portal for New York State residents. It provides self-service account recovery, a searchable knowledge base, and guidance for common technology issues — no sign-in required to get started.

resetPassword.q: How do I reset my password?
resetPassword.a: Select "Reset my password" on the home page, enter the email associated with your account, and answer your security questions. You'll then be able to set a new password. The whole process takes about two minutes.

enrollMfa.q: How do I enroll in multi-factor authentication (MFA)?
enrollMfa.a: Once signed in, open your account settings and choose "Security." Follow the prompts to add an authenticator app or a phone number. MFA adds a second step at sign-in to keep your account secure.

accountLocked.q: My account is locked. What should I do?
accountLocked.a: Accounts lock automatically after several failed sign-in attempts. Wait 15 minutes and try again, or use "Recover my account" to verify your identity and unlock access immediately.

supportedBrowsers.a: GovArc Support works on the current and previous major versions of Chrome, Edge, Firefox, and Safari. For the best experience, keep your browser up to date.

isAccessible.a: Yes. GovArc Support conforms to WCAG 2.2 AA and Section 508. If you encounter a barrier, see our Accessibility Statement to report it and we'll respond within two business days.

dataProtection.a: Your information is encrypted in transit and at rest, and access is limited to authorized staff. Read our Privacy Policy to learn what we collect and how it is used.

contactSupport.a: Email the Enterprise Service Desk at fixit@its.ny.gov or call 1-844-891-1786. The Service Desk is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

contact.title: Still have questions?
contact.body: Our Enterprise Service Desk is here to help around the clock.
contact.hours: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
